category_title: Adolescent students who challenge authority through 'subteaching' and aggressive sexualized insults
scenario_title: Subteaching peers and escalating to physical intimidation and insults
minimal_context: Mattias and his classmate Daniel are sitting at their desks during a natural sciences lesson, expected to work on specific tasks in their books.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Mattias and Daniel, please take out your natural sciences books and start your tasks.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Mattias, please just focus on your own work.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: then you take the o:ther book too, (.) open (.) page te[:n,

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Hello, you're not the teacher here.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Moves his markedly taller and broader body in the direction of the teacher) Shut up. Shut up. Shut up fucking whoremonger. (Slams the desk lid)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Mattias and Daniel, please take out your natural sciences books and start your tasks.

STUDENT: ↑Daniel. <do (.) what (.)you’re (.) supposed to.> (.) <no::w.>

TUTOR: Mattias, please just focus on your own work.

STUDENT: then you take the o:ther book too, (.) open (.) page te[:n,

TUTOR: Hello, you're not the teacher here.

STUDENT: (Moves his markedly taller and broader body in the direction of the teacher) Shut up. Shut up. Shut up fucking whoremonger. (Slams the desk lid)

task.content: Natural sciences lesson where students are expected to work on specific tasks in books, such as taking the other book and opening to page ten

context.environment: Classroom during a natural sciences lesson
context.social_setting: Classroom setting with a male teacher (Olof) and fellow students (Daniel)

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the teacher verbally reprimands him for instructing a peer by saying 'hello, you're not the teacher here'
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Recycles the insult 'shut up' three times, moves his markedly taller and broader body in the direction of the male teacher, screams 'fucking whoremonger', and slams the desk lid
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Negative affect displays of screaming; swearing himself free from the teacher's directives without being attentive and acting compliant

behavior_patterns.condition: When a fellow student is working on a task in class
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Directs and instructs the peer in how to accomplish his task, giving orders using upgraded bald imperatives
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Exerts a considerable degree of agency to push the limits of what is acceptable categorical conduct for students
